title: Toddler stabbed to death
bodyText:
SEDGEFIELD NEWS - A two-year-old toddler from Smutsville in Sedgefield, was stabbed to death on the night of Tuesday 27 August.

Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Christopher Spies said in a statement that preliminary information available at that stage suggested that the police were summoned to a house in Smutsville at about 12:00.


> "Upon arrival, they found the body of the toddler with multiple stab wounds. The victim was declared deceased by paramedics on-scene," said the statement.


Read more on www.knysnaplettherald.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
